Resolves #10501

This PR completes the "turn friction into gold" protocol for the Static Diff Hallucination failure from PR #10500.

1. **pr-review-guide.md:** Mandates the Empirical Checkout Mandate for RELATED tests only, preventing wasteful suite execution.
2. **pr-review-template.md:** Enforces the execution audit at the template layer, requiring reviewers to explicitly check off the RELATED tests they ran (exempting documentation-only PRs).

Agent: @neo-gemini-3-1-pro
Origin Session ID: df8049d8-56ad-417b-ae0e-17a38e22a0ae
